case_title: MITSUI MARINE & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, LIMITED vs. NORTHWEST AIRLINES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ROBERT C. CHILES RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITSUI MARINE & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, LIMITED
DECLARATION OF ROBERT C. CHILES RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITSUI MARINE & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, LIMITED
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-26-1996, OFF CALENDAR

GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITSUI MARINE & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, LIMITED AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES INTERTRANS AIRFREIGHT CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-27-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-29-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-07-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-27-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-27-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE ON NORTHWEST AIRLINES, AND FAILED TO ENTER DEFAULT ON INTERTRANS AIRFREIGHT. HEARING SET FOR APR-26-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & CASE QUESTIONNAIRE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITSUI MARINE & FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY, LIMITED SERVED DEC-04-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT INTERTRANS AIRFREIGHT CORPORATION
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF, RE: DISMISSAL TO BE FILED. (CASE REMAINS ON 4/26/96 T.D. CALENDAR UNTIL DISMISSAL IS FILED AND ENTERED)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
